chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1010 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of main case. 06.10.2025 Mr. Shafique Ahmed Laghari, Advocate along with petitioner. Mr. Naimat Ali Shah, Advocate for respondent No.6. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G along with Dr. Masroor Zia, Medical Superintendent, KMC-Civil Hospital, Khairpur..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The respondents No.3 and 6 file their separate statements, same are taken on record. Copies thereof have been provided to the counsel for the petitioner. By consent of both the parties, the instant petition is disposed of under terms, that the respondent No.6 will remain in the quarter for a period of four months, and shall regularly pay the utility bills during this period. Thereafter, he shall hand over vacant possession of the said quarter to the petitioner in its original condition. In case of failure to vacate the quarter after the stipulated period, the official respondents shall take necessary steps to vacate the premises. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
